page: Google Cloud Platform ct5l-hightpu-8t is an accelerator-optimized server type designed for specialized machine learning workloads. It features an x86_64 CPU architecture with 224 dedicated vCPUs and 384.0 GB of RAM, yielding a resource density of 1.71 GB of memory per core. This server configuration does not include local storage or complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

The defining characteristic of this configuration is the integration of 8 Google TPUs of the ct5l model. This hardware acceleration profile is engineered for high-density matrix operations. From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the server trades off local storage and high per-core memory capacity to maximize compute density and dedicated accelerator throughput, making it a highly specialized resource.

Due to the presence of 8 dedicated TPUs and a high vCPU count, the ct5l-hightpu-8t is suited for large-scale machine learning training, deep learning inference, and data science pipelines that leverage TPU-optimized frameworks. It is not intended for general-purpose hosting or storage-heavy database applications.
description: Google Cloud Platform ct5l-hightpu-8t is a specialized, accelerator-optimized server configured with 224 dedicated x86_64 vCPUs and 384.0 GB of RAM. This configuration provides a memory-to-core ratio of 1.71 GB per vCPU. The primary hardware feature is the inclusion of 8 Google TPUs, which deliver dedicated acceleration for matrix-intensive computations. The server does not include local storage or complimentary public IPv4 addresses. Qualitatively, the hardware profile represents a high-density compute resource that trades off local storage and high per-core memory capacity to focus resources on accelerator-driven performance. This server is designed for machine learning training, large-scale deep learning inference, and TPU-accelerated data science workloads.
og_description: Google Cloud Platform ct5l-hightpu-8t is an accelerator-optimized server featuring 224 dedicated x86_64 vCPUs, 384 GB RAM, and 8 integrated Google TPUs for machine learning workloads.

tagline: An accelerator-optimized configuration featuring dedicated compute cores and eight integrated TPUs for high-density machine learning and deep learning workloads.
